_source: player.vimeo.com/video/76979871/config (public, refererless) — captured 2026-07-09. Real STRUCTURE: progressive renditions on vod-progressive-ak.vimeocdn.com (heights 360/270/720/540) + HLS cdns (akfire default). The progressive/hls URLs are short-lived signed CDN links, so the opaque exp/hmac tokens here are placeholders (SIG) — the resolver returns the URL verbatim and only host-pins to vimeocdn.com, so token contents are irrelevant to the test.
